stems.master: string — relative file path to original mix

sections.label: string — from closed vocabulary: intro | verse | pre_chorus | chorus | post_chorus | bridge | breakdown | outro | instrumental | ad_lib
sections.instance: integer — which occurrence, e.g. 1 for first verse, 2 for second verse
sections.energy_level: number — normalized 0.0 to 1.0, average energy for this section

beat_grid.beat_number: integer — beat within the measure, e.g. 1, 2, 3, 4
beat_grid.strength: string — from closed vocabulary: downbeat | strong | weak | off

micro_events.type: string — from closed vocabulary: snare_hit | kick_hit | bass_drop | vocal_onset | vocal_offset | silence_start | silence_end | crash | fill_start | fill_end | chord_change | buildup_start | drop
micro_events.section: string — which section label this falls in
micro_events.significance: string — from closed vocabulary: high | medium | low
micro_events.note: string | null — optional freeform context, e.g. 'main vocal entry after intro'

energy_curve.time: number — timestamp in seconds, sampled at regular intervals (e.g. every 0.5s)
